source: Curated high-confidence subset forked from gitleaks (github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks, MIT, (c) 2019 Zachary Rice). Regex-deterministic vendor formats only: distinctive prefixes, no entropy, BOUNDED quantifiers (ReDoS-safe), JS-compiled. See THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES.
